# F24A6 — Transition QA Routes and Scenes

## Goal

Create isolated QA fixtures for the upcoming Transition Contract and Transition Unity Surface cuts.

The baseline QA scenes remain focused on framework boot/route/activity smokes. Transition-specific tests should use the Unity Build Surface QA workspace instead.

## Generated by editor tool

Command:

`Immersive Framework > QA > Unity Build Surface > Create Transition QA Routes and Scenes`

Generated paths:

- `Assets/ImmersiveFrameworkQA/UnityBuildSurface/Scenes/TransitionRouteA.unity`
- `Assets/ImmersiveFrameworkQA/UnityBuildSurface/Scenes/TransitionRouteB.unity`
- `Assets/ImmersiveFrameworkQA/UnityBuildSurface/Routes/QA_TransitionRouteA.asset`
- `Assets/ImmersiveFrameworkQA/UnityBuildSurface/Routes/QA_TransitionRouteB.asset`
- `Assets/ImmersiveFrameworkQA/UnityBuildSurface/Activities/QA_TransitionActivityA.asset`
- `Assets/ImmersiveFrameworkQA/UnityBuildSurface/Activities/QA_TransitionActivityB.asset`

## Boundary

This cut creates QA fixtures only.

It does not implement:

- Transition contract wiring;
- transition visuals;
- loading screen;
- pause overlay;
- framework core changes;
- adapter modules.

## Validation

Run the editor command twice. The second run must not duplicate scenes/assets.

Then confirm both transition scenes are enabled in Build Settings.
